summary: Tested newly added Doula Notes and Midwife Birth Summaries features. Backend: 9/9 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All screens load correctly after expo restart. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in birth summaries endpoint.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not being removed before response, causing 500 error

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Pressable clicks don't trigger properly in Playwright. Need JS click workaround.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - testing only, works in real browser

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed clients, notes, visits, and birth summaries for regression testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Doula Notes and Midwife Birth Summaries features verified working. Known Playwright issue with React Native Web tab clicks - use JavaScript click workaround. Midwife now has 7 total clients and 3 birth summaries from test data.

doula_notes.Frontend Notes screen: PASS - shows 'Client Notes' title, filter section, note cards with Prenatal badge

midwife.GET /api/midwife/dashboard: PASS - returns stats (total_clients, prenatal_clients, visits_this_month, births_this_month)
midwife.Frontend Dashboard: PASS - shows 'Midwife Dashboard' with correct stats
midwife.Frontend Navigation: PASS - 5 tabs visible (Dashboard, Clients, Visits, Births, Profile)
midwife.Frontend Birth Summaries: PASS - shows birth summary cards with client name, date, place, mode, newborn details
